description: Very damaged and faded marriage agreement written by Mevurakh b. Nathan (Date: 1150-1181). Some lines from the dowry list is visible, and also few of the commonly found conditions such as the trustworthy and the monogamy clause. AA
tags: Marriage, Mevorakh b. Natan, dowry list
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
